title: V3Premit goes into infinite loop on always read-and-write

features.name: always block with self-read-write hazard
features.description: Code should include an always @(*) procedural block that first assigns to a variable and then reads from that same variable for array/bit indexing within a subsequent assignment

features.name: struct member array indexed by same struct variable field
features.description: Code should include a packed struct with a bit-vector field that is indexed by another field of the same struct variable being assigned in an always block
